summary: iter244 testing complete. 24/25 backend tests passed (1 skipped - no VIP pings for fan-out test). Fixed missing HTTPException import in ecw_ops_iter242_misc.py. Mobile gallery UI fully verified with all features working. Desktop gallery could not be tested due to transient sidebar loading error.

integration_issues.issue: Transient 'Error loading Sidebar' and 'Error loading SystemSettings' on desktop app - appears to be intermittent

action_items: Investigate transient desktop sidebar loading error (may be related to API timeouts or race conditions)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Missing HTTPException import in /app/backend/routes/ecw_ops_iter242_misc.py - was causing 500 error instead of 404 for invalid shelf_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter244 adds: (1) Firebase push endpoints with real SA JSON loaded from /app/backend/secrets/firebase-admin-sdk.json. (2) Gallery backend with enriched list, full detail, likes, notes, link-recipe, link-menu-item, recognize endpoints. (3) AR shelf scan with shelf-count endpoint. Mobile gallery UI is ultra-modern editorial style with masonry grid, cinematic viewer, and action buttons. Desktop gallery exists but couldn't be tested due to sidebar loading issue.

firebase_push.details: GET /api/push/status returns firebase_ready=true, POST /api/push/register-token upserts tokens, POST /api/push/test returns ok with tokens count

gallery_backend.details: All gallery endpoints working: list (enriched), full detail, like (idempotent), notes, link-recipe (404 on invalid), link-menu-item (404 on invalid), recognize, recipe-options, menu-item-options

storage_ar_scan.details: POST /api/storage-map/shelf-count creates shelf_counts row, sets last_scan_at on shelf. Fixed HTTPException import bug.

mobile_gallery_ui.details: gallery-root, gallery-search, gallery-filter-all/confirmed/linked, gallery-grid (masonry), gallery-card, gallery-viewer (cinematic), gallery-like-btn, viewer-link-recipe, viewer-link-menu, viewer-recognize, viewer-dish-assembly, viewer-note-input, viewer-note-save all visible and functional

mobile_storage_ar.details: storage-map-root, storage-ar-scan-btn, ar-shelf-pick (10 shelves), ar-scan-camera with reticle overlay, ar-scan-commit button all visible. Camera permission denied in headless (expected) but UI renders correctly.

desktop_gallery.details: Desktop sidebar failed to load (transient error) - could not navigate to Food Gallery panel

mocked_apis_note: Firebase send_each_for_multicast will fail with fake tokens but endpoint returns structured response. Vision recognition uses real Emergent LLM Key (Claude). AR camera barcode detection uses native browser BarcodeDetector.
